---
title: Implementation Overview
---


# Reconstruction Quality Metrics & RRI Computation {#metrics-index}

This section provides a comprehensive overview of reconstruction quality metrics and how to compute the Relative Reconstruction Improvement (RRI) score for Next-Best-View planning.

## Overview

The evaluation of 3D reconstruction quality relies on comparing predicted reconstructions against ground truth meshes. Both **ATEK** and **EFM3D** provide implementations for computing these metrics using:

- **[Trimesh](https://github.com/mikedh/trimesh)**: For mesh loading and surface sampling
- **PyTorch**: For efficient distance computations
- **Point-to-mesh distance functions**: Core geometric primitives

## Contents

This section is organized into the following topics:

1. **[Theory: Surface Reconstruction Metrics](../theory/surface_metrics.qmd)** - Core metrics: Accuracy, Completeness, Chamfer Distance, Precision/Recall
2. **[ATEK Implementation](../ext-impl/atek_implementation.qmd)** - Detailed breakdown of ATEK's mesh evaluation functions
3. **[EFM3D Implementation](../ext-impl/efm3d_implementation.qmd)** - EFM3D utilities for point clouds, rays, and voxels
4. **[RRI Computation](rri_computation.qmd)** - Complete pipeline for computing RRI oracle with ASE dataset

## Quick Reference: Key Functions

### From ATEK


| Function | Purpose | Location |
|----------|---------|----------|
| [`evaluate_single_mesh_pair()`](https://github.com/facebookresearch/ATEK/blob/main/atek/evaluation/surface_reconstruction/surface_reconstruction_metrics.py#L32) | Complete mesh evaluation pipeline | `surface_reconstruction_metrics.py` |
| [`compute_pts_to_mesh_dist()`](https://github.com/facebookresearch/ATEK/blob/main/atek/evaluation/surface_reconstruction/surface_reconstruction_utils.py#L97) | Point-to-mesh distance computation | `surface_reconstruction_utils.py` |
| [`point_to_closest_tri_dist()`](https://github.com/facebookresearch/ATEK/blob/main/atek/evaluation/surface_reconstruction/surface_reconstruction_utils.py#L45) | Point-to-triangle projection + distance | `surface_reconstruction_utils.py` |

### From EFM3D

| Function | Purpose | Location |
|----------|---------|----------|
| [`eval_mesh_to_mesh()`](https://github.com/facebookresearch/efm3d/blob/main/efm3d/utils/mesh_utils.py#L118) | Mesh evaluation with visualizations | `utils/mesh_utils.py` |
| [`dist_im_to_point_cloud_im()`](https://github.com/facebookresearch/efm3d/blob/main/efm3d/utils/depth.py#L20) | Depth → point cloud conversion | `utils/depth.py` |
| [`ray_obb_intersection()`](https://github.com/facebookresearch/efm3d/blob/main/efm3d/utils/ray.py#L90) | Ray-box intersection for sampling | `utils/ray.py` |
| [`sample_depths_in_grid()`](https://github.com/facebookresearch/efm3d/blob/main/efm3d/utils/ray.py#L196) | Sample depths along rays in voxel grid | `utils/ray.py` |
| [`pointcloud_to_occupancy_snippet()`](https://github.com/facebookresearch/efm3d/blob/main/efm3d/utils/pointcloud.py#L182) | Point cloud → occupancy grid with free space | `utils/pointcloud.py` |
| [`pointcloud_to_voxel_counts()`](https://github.com/facebookresearch/efm3d/blob/main/efm3d/utils/pointcloud.py#L380) | Point cloud → voxel density grid | `utils/pointcloud.py` |

## References

- **ATEK**: [GitHub - ATEK Surface Reconstruction Metrics](https://github.com/facebookresearch/ATEK/blob/main/atek/evaluation/surface_reconstruction/)
- **EFM3D**: [GitHub - EFM3D Utils](https://github.com/facebookresearch/efm3d/tree/main/efm3d/utils)
- **VIN-NBV**: Frahm et al., "View Introspection Network for Next-Best-View Selection", 2025
- **Trimesh**: [trimesh documentation](https://trimsh.org/)
